ValidationRule.description: Opportunity (Record Type = Due Diligence) needs to be mandatory when the case type are DDQ Initial, Pure RFPs, DDQ Follow up and DD onsite
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), OR(ISPICKVAL(Type, 'DD - On-site'), ISPICKVAL(Type, 'RFP')), ISBLANK(Opportunity__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'RFP_RFI_Questionnaire' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You need to link an opportunity for the chosen Type
